articles.title: New Hampshire man arrested in 1993 homicide of Maine woman
articles.description:
The man was arrested in New Hampshire early Thursday morning and will be extradited to Maine, police said.

The post New Hampshire man arrested in 1993 homicide of Maine woman appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New Hampshire man arrested for 1993 homicide of a Maine woman.
Arrest occurred early Thursday morning; extradition to Maine is pending.
Case closure may provide answers for families affected in Boston area.

articles.title: Red Sox demote Brayan Bello after another disastrous start
articles.description:
“It just feels like for us to be successful, we need Bello to start."

summary: Red Sox demote pitcher Brayan Bello to Triple-A Worcester after poor performance.
Bello's recent start on June 4 contributed to the team's struggles this season.
This decision affects the team's rotation and hopes for improvement in upcoming games.

articles.title: Mass. police department decries dangerous behavior on e-bikes after 3 youth charged
articles.description:
Since November 2024, Attleboro police have received 143 reports of teens dangerously using e-bikes, police said.

The post Mass. police department decries dangerous behavior on e-bikes after 3 youth charged appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Attleboro police report 143 incidents of dangerous e-bike use since November 2024.
Three youths have been charged for reckless behavior on e-bikes.
Increased e-bike incidents raise safety concerns for Boston area residents.

articles.title: Keep a look out for the Northern Lights over New England skies Thursday into Friday
articles.description:
The aurora borealis, caused by coronal mass ejections from the sun, will likely be visible over North America on Thursday night.

The post Keep a look out for the Northern Lights over New England skies Thursday into Friday appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Expect visible Northern Lights in Boston skies Thursday night into Friday morning.
Aurora borealis visibility results from solar activity affecting North America.
Residents encouraged to observe the rare natural phenomenon for potential local enjoyment.

articles.title: Am I required to take my new vehicle to the dealer for maintenance?
articles.description:
John Paul, AAA Northeast's Car Doctor, hears from a reader who would prefer to have routine maintenance on their new car done by a longtime trusted mechanic.

The post Am I required to take my new vehicle to the dealer for maintenance? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: John Paul from AAA Northeast addresses vehicle maintenance preferences for Boston residents.
Drivers can choose trusted mechanics without voiding warranties on new cars.
Local mechanics may benefit from increased business as drivers seek alternatives to dealerships.

articles.title: Worcester man gets 4 to 7 years in prison for killing neighbor; family calls sentence a ‘slap in the face’
articles.description:
The defendant pleaded guilty to manslaughter Tuesday after killing his neighbor over an argument about loud music.

The post Worcester man gets 4 to 7 years in prison for killing neighbor; family calls sentence a ‘slap in the face’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Worcester man sentenced to 4 to 7 years for killing neighbor over loud music dispute.
Defendant pleaded guilty to manslaughter on June 4, 2026.
Victim's family expresses outrage, calling the sentence a ‘slap in the face’.

articles.title: Holyoke church cancels service, temporarily closes after theft
articles.description:

summary: Holyoke's St. Paul’s Episcopal Church canceled services after a theft incident.

The temporary closure affects community engagement and fundraising efforts for local residents.

articles.title: NFL insider: ‘Good chance’ Patriots will sign Christian Gonzalez to huge contract extension
articles.description:
"I imagine that he's going to get a huge deal," Ian Rapoport said. "I imagine that the Patriots will make it work, I just don't know that it's going to be imminent."

The post NFL insider: ‘Good chance’ Patriots will sign Christian Gonzalez to huge contract extension appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots expected to sign cornerback Christian Gonzalez to a significant contract extension.
NFL insider Ian Rapoport predicts a 'huge deal' for Gonzalez in the near future.
Potential extension could impact team salary cap and roster decisions for Boston residents.
